## Subject

Cortical electrodes can reach ALL 15 deep brain structures — computational proof with 8 theorems (DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19279028)

## Body

Dear Neuralink Team,

I'm Min Woo Park, an independent researcher working on consciousness engineering via brain stimulation hardware (BrainWire project).

I've published a computational paper proving that cortical-only electrodes (like N1) can modulate ALL 15 major subcortical structures through indirect pathways — without physically reaching them
